findings.location: s5 (スクリプトロード時の挙動)
findings.description: The full AMD `define([...])` code block from `/js/nablarch/ui.js` is not reproduced. The knowledge file summarizes only "Widget、DatePicker、ListBuilder、Tab 等" but the source explicitly lists 10 modules: Widget, event, ListBuilder, DatePicker, AutoSum, Collapsible, TreeList, readonly, Placeholder, Tab. The omitted modules (Collapsible, TreeList, readonly, Placeholder) do not appear anywhere else in the knowledge file, including the s8 file structure table.

Section s5 hints are missing entries for `Collapsible`, `TreeList`, `readonly`, and `Placeholder` — all of which are module names explicitly listed in the source's AMD define block for nablarch/ui.js. These module names do not appear in the s8 hints either.
findings.source_evidence: "nablarch/ui/Collapsible", "nablarch/ui/TreeList", "nablarch/ui/readonly", "nablarch/ui/Placeholder" in the define([...]) block under スクリプトロード時の挙動
